label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15

extraction.one_line_summary: MÄDER Gino soloed to victory from 87.3km out after Movistar chased the original break, fracturing the peloton at extreme early pace.
tactical_patterns: Movistar chased quality 25-rider break despite no UAE presence, fracturing peloton at 51+km/hr opening hour pace.
Jumbo-Visma seeded multiple breaks (Sepp Kuss early, Wiebes from chase group) guaranteeing result from fragmented race.
YATES Adam attacked favorites group on final cat-3 climb for 15sec bonus despite GC deficit, gap-managing rather than podium-hunting.
MÄDER rejected ARU collaboration 87km out, choosing solo effort over coordinated chase defense against 8-rider group.

rider_signals.MÄDER Gino: positive: sustained 87km solo after ditching Aru, building KOM points while holding off organized 8-rider chase
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: opportunistically attacked GC group on minor climb for time gap, showing recovery and tactical awareness
rider_signals.VERONA Carlos: neutral: present in quality 8-rider chase but couldn't organize effective pursuit of Mäder's long-range move
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: hesitated when Yates attacked from GC group, considering but abandoning chase response
